deep_dive.title: Timage: A Generative Text-in-Image Paradigm for Fine-Tuning Vision-Language Models
deep_dive.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) often lose track of the right image regions during fine-grained spatial reasoning, because a textual query rarely carries any explicit geometric anchor into the pixel domain. Prevailing remedies either rewire the model's weights or pad the prompt with verbose instructions, yet neither reliably pins the language to the correct visual coordinates without eroding the backbone's general competence. We introduce Timage, a paradigm that recasts multimodal understanding as an alignment problem solved at the input: the query is drawn, as a typeset overlay, onto the image itself. The placement and appearance of this overlay are produced by a Constrained Schrödinger Bridge (cSB), an entropic optimal-transport sampler that factorizes layout synthesis into two coupled stochastic stages. The first stage, Region Search, transports noise toward query-aligned image zones while obeying a hard occlusion barrier that protects salient foreground content; the second stage, Appearance Shaping, sizes the glyphs through an ``ink-budget'' regularizer so that the rendered text stays legible and visually balanced. The resulting overlay behaves as an explicit attention beacon that channels the model's focus along spatial semantics. On the VMCBench suite, Timage paired with a modest 7B backbone clearly overtakes far larger proprietary systems as well as parameter-tuned baselines. The study positions deliberate input reconstruction as a powerful, architecture-neutral lever for strengthening multimodal reasoning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Constrained Schrödinger Bridge (cSB) used for optimal transport in text-in-image overlay generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 约束薛定谔桥（cSB）用于文本-图像叠加中的最优输运
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 约束薛定谔桥（cSB）用于文本-图像叠加中的最优输运
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 约束薛定谔桥（cSB）用于文本-图像叠加中的最优输运
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces Timage, a paradigm that uses a Constrained Schrödinger Bridge (cSB) to place text overlays on images for fine-tuning vision-language models, directly applying entropic optimal transport and Schrödinger bridge.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 多模态大模型在细粒度空间推理中常丢失图像区域。本文提出Timage范式，将查询作为排版覆盖叠加到图像上，其位置和外观由约束薛定谔桥（cSB）生成。cSB是一种熵正则化的最优输运方法，直接求解薛定谔桥问题。该方法在多模态理解任务上展现了有效性，展示了薛定谔桥在视觉-语言对齐中的实用价值。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 多模态大模型在细粒度空间推理中常丢失图像区域。本文提出Timage范式，将查询作为排版覆盖叠加到图像上，其位置和外观由约束薛定谔桥（cSB）生成。cSB是一种熵正则化的最优输运方法，直接求解薛定谔桥问题。该方法在多模态理解任务上展现了有效性，展示了薛定谔桥在视觉-语言对齐中的实用价值。

quick_skim.title: Perron--Frobenius Operator Matching for Generative Modeling
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Perron--Frobenius Operator Matching (PFOM), a generative framework that matches density evolution via the integral PF operator, subsuming flow, diffusion, and jump models. We prove that among Bregman divergences, only Kullback--Leibler divergence preserves equality between density-level and sample-conditioned objectives, yielding a practical loss equivalent to Koopman path matching. We further develop Nesterov-accelerated training and sampling that stabilize discretization and accelerate convergence. %On Gaussian mixtures and two-moons, PFOM achieves faster KL/$W_2$/MMD decrease and improved wall-clock efficiency with empirical validation. PFOM unifies operator-theoretic identification with modern generative modeling and opens paths to adaptive dictionaries and high-dimensional applications.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: unifies flow, diffusion, and jump models via operator matching, relevant to stochastic bridge processes for generative modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过算子匹配统一流、扩散和跳跃模型，与用于生成建模的随机桥过程相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过算子匹配统一流、扩散和跳跃模型，与用于生成建模的随机桥过程相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过算子匹配统一流、扩散和跳跃模型，与用于生成建模的随机桥过程相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Perron-Frobenius Operator Matching (PFOM), a generative framework that matches density evolution via the integral PF operator, subsuming flow, diffusion, and jump models, with practical loss equivalent to Koopman path matching.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 提出Perron-Frobenius算子匹配（PFOM）生成框架，通过积分PF算子匹配密度演化，统一了流、扩散和跳跃模型。证明仅在KL散度下密度级和样本级目标等价，并开发了Nesterov加速训练和采样。实验表明PFOM在KL、Wasserstein和MMD指标上收敛更快。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 提出Perron-Frobenius算子匹配（PFOM）生成框架，通过积分PF算子匹配密度演化，统一了流、扩散和跳跃模型。证明仅在KL散度下密度级和样本级目标等价，并开发了Nesterov加速训练和采样。实验表明PFOM在KL、Wasserstein和MMD指标上收敛更快。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 帮我查找有关diffusion bridge的相关paper, especially work that connects or combines: diffusion bridge connecting two probability distributions; Schrödinger bridge problem in stochastic processes; stochastic bridge processes for generative modeling; optimal transport in diffusion bridges; path integral formulation for diffusion processes; Constructing a diffusion bridge between two arbitrary probability distributions; Solving the Schrödinger bridge problem using score based diffusion models.
